data.scene: User clicks a media file (camera stream, doorbell video, audio) on the dashboard.
data.purpose: Play surveillance camera streams, doorbell videos, and audio media from Home Assistant.
data.item: Media stream content (audio/video) from HA server
data.frequency: On-demand (each time the user taps a media item)
data.processing: Local playback only; streamed over HTTPS from the user's Home Assistant server
data.storage: Not stored on device; transient playback only
data.recipient: Device-local only (rendered via native ExoPlayer overlay)
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; media is streamed directly from the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: N/A (media playback triggered per-item from the dashboard)
